overall.description: A third-person horror game sequence following a schoolgirl in uniform walking through a foggy, dark Japanese shrine forest at night. The character ascends stone steps through dense mist, passing traditional wooden torii gates and stone lanterns, creating an atmospheric, suspenseful mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with stone steps leading to shrine

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up stone steps through dense foggy forest, holding a flashlight

entered.detail: tall dark tree trunk with rough bark texture
traditional Japanese stone lanterns lining the path
dark wooden shrine gate with curved roof tiles
weathered stone steps ascending through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks up stone steps through a dense, foggy forest. Traditional stone lanterns line the path, and a wooden shrine gate looms ahead in the mist. The atmosphere is dark and foreboding with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine gate entrance with cemetery visible

events.description: character walks under the wooden shrine gate structure
character turns right toward the large torii gate in the distance

agents.ego_description: passing through the shrine gate and turning toward a distant torii gate

entered.detail: dark wooden shrine building with extended roof
massive stone torii gate visible through the mist
grave markers and stone monuments in the background

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the wooden shrine gate, briefly sheltered by its roof. To the right, a cemetery with stone markers is visible. The character turns toward a massive torii gate looming in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching large torii gate

events.description: character approaches and passes through the large stone torii gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through the massive torii gate

entered.detail: dense tree canopy blocking the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path flanked by dense vegetation, approaching the massive stone torii gate. The gate grows larger as the character nears, eventually passing through its pillars into the inner sanctuary area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred tree sanctuary with massive roots

events.description: character arrives at the massive sacred tree with shimenawa ropes

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient sacred tree, examining the massive exposed roots and sacred ropes

entered.detail: massive ancient tree trunk with thick exposed roots
thick sacred straw ropes with white paper streamers hanging across the tree
gnarled thick tree roots spreading across the ground

segments.scene_description: After passing through the torii gate, the character enters a clearing dominated by an enormous sacred tree. Massive exposed roots spread across the ground, and thick shimenawa ropes with white paper streamers hang across the trunk. The character approaches this central sacred element as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, foggy forest that gradually opens into a sacred sanctuary. It begins with the character ascending stone steps lined with lanterns, moving through a dense mist toward a looming wooden shrine gate. As the character passes under the gate's shelter, the view briefly reveals a cemetery of stone markers to the right before the path shifts toward a massive torii gate appearing in the distance. The scene then expands along a dirt path flanked by thick vegetation, with the stone gate growing in scale until the camera passes through its pillars. Finally, the environment opens into a clearing dominated by an enormous sacred tree, where the camera approaches massive exposed roots and shimenawa ropes adorned with white paper streamers.
